name: ball room
hints: A grand ballroom with a chandelier near the ceiling and a rope. There is a loft above that seems inaccessible.
LOOK UP or LOOK CEILING to see the inaccessible loft area above. The rope and chandelier may be the way up.
The chandelier has a star on it (room 8). You need to reach it - perhaps by climbing the rope or using a spell to fly/float up.
Use the Dizzy Dean spell or climb the rope to reach the chandelier and loft. WEST returns to the courtyard.
notes: The ballroom with a chandelier near the ceiling, a tied rope, and an inaccessible loft above. The chandelier (room 8) has a star and broken glass on it. The loft (room 15) has a potion. Need a way to reach them - rope, spell, or climbing. West returns to courtyard (room 3).
